queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of lacking a checking account to credit default probability and risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating effects of critical or other existing credit history on borrower default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of employment duration less than one year to credit risk drivers and default probability.
